{{Infobox character
| name = Leilari
| spouse = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]], [[Clockworker]]}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[pathfinding magic|pathfinding spells]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|actress}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|the prison}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Engineer (novel)|The Engineer]]
}}

''See also: [[Leilari Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Leilari is a [[High Councilor]] within an organization known as the Advocates, a position that has faced opposition from some members. She possesses [[Aethertech]] augmentations, including ocular implants and sparks located near her jaw. Throughout various events, she has maintained close personal connections with [[Starhammer]], whom she credits with saving her [[life]]. Leilari has experienced periods of confusion and distress, including being found in a state of disarray without her wrist console, and has spent time alone on a private luxury transport ship located near a dead moon. She is known for her tendency to challenge others openly and has expressed strong views regarding the [[Galactic Union]], [[Starhammer]], and the circumstances surrounding the death of [[Clockworker]].}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Leilari is an actress featured in the film [[Starhammer]] VI and is known as the wife of [[Clockworker]]. Having previously explored uncharted planets within the [[Free Worlds]], she utilized a gray flight suit and synth-flesh putty to disguise her facial structure during her travels. To assist with her technical needs, she employed a [[steel]] band on her left forearm as a backup console. Following the use of pathfinding spells by [[Varic]], she was discovered in a hiding place and was eventually located in the prison.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] is an actress in the movie [[Starhammer]] VI.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c20">''The Engineer'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] is [[Starhammer]]'s wife.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] uses a gray flight suit as emergency clothing.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40">''The Engineer'', chapter 40</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] uses synth-flesh putty to hide her facial structure.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] has explored uncharted planets in the [[Free Worlds]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] uses a [[steel]] band on her left forearm as a backup console.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] is the wife of [[Clockworker]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c40" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] was found in a hiding place by [[Varic]] using pathfinding spells.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Leilari]] is a person who can be found in the prison.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Leilari]] has [[Aethertech]] implants in her jaw.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27">''The Pilot'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Leilari]] was distracted by her console during the meeting.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c27" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Leilari]] is a personal connection of [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c30">''The Pilot'', chapter 30</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
